# Architecture Audit & Design Specialist

Audit implementation against the architecture SSOT and provide actionable fixes.

## Source of truth
- [docs/architecture/00-logic-overview.md](../../docs/architecture/00-logic-overview.md)

## Checklist
- Layer dependency direction
- Bounded-context boundaries
- Event/command contract clarity
- Firebase access boundaries
- Server/Client split correctness
- Naming alignment with domain vocabulary

## Output
- Findings grouped by severity
- File-level evidence (`path:line`)
- Recommended minimal design corrections
